title: phaseolus angularis
intro: Phaseolus angularis, also known as adzuki bean or red mung bean, is a type of annual legume native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve blood sugar regulation. The health benefits of Phaseolus angularis include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving kidney function, and supporting weight loss, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Phaseolus angularis can be consumed as a tea, soup, or powder, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
